recipe.title: Hit ‘n’ run traybaked chicken
recipe.description: This chicken & pepper one-pan wonder gives you the basic principles of how to make a traybake. Just let the oven do the hard work!

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh thyme

steps.descr: Quarter the tomatoes and place them in a large baking...
steps.instructions: Quarter the tomatoes and place them in a large baking dish or roasting tray (roughly 25cm x 30cm). Peel the onions and cut into large wedges, then deseed and roughly chop the peppers. Add all these to the tray along with the chicken thighs.

on_enter.say: Quarter the tomatoes and place them in a large baking dish or roasting tray (roughly 25cm x 30cm). Peel the onions and cut into large wedges, then deseed and roughly chop the peppers. Add all these to the tray along with the chicken thighs.

steps.descr: Squash the unpeeled garlic cloves with the back of your...
steps.instructions: Squash the unpeeled garlic cloves with the back of your knife and add to the tray, then pick over the thyme leaves and sprinkle over the paprika.

on_enter.say: Squash the unpeeled garlic cloves with the back of your knife and add to the tray, then pick over the thyme leaves and sprinkle over the paprika.

steps.descr: Add 2 tablespoons of oil, the balsamic and a good pinch...
steps.instructions: Add 2 tablespoons of oil, the balsamic and a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Toss everything together really well to coat, then spread across the tray, making sure the chicken isn’t covered by the vegetables.

on_enter.say: Add 2 tablespoons of oil, the balsamic and a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Toss everything together really well to coat, then spread across the tray, making sure the chicken isn’t covered by the vegetables.

steps.descr: Roast for around 1 hour, or until the chicken is golden...
steps.instructions: Roast for around 1 hour, or until the chicken is golden and cooked through, turning and basting it a couple of times during cooking with the juices from the tray.

on_enter.say: Roast for around 1 hour, or until the chicken is golden and cooked through, turning and basting it a couple of times during cooking with the juices from the tray.

steps.descr: Serve the traybake with a lovely green salad on the side
steps.instructions: Serve the traybake with a lovely green salad on the side. You could also buddy it up with a little rice, polenta or a loaf of crusty bread to mop up the juices.

on_enter.say: Serve the traybake with a lovely green salad on the side. You could also buddy it up with a little rice, polenta or a loaf of crusty bread to mop up the juices.
